Class PostStorage

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.PostStorage
public class PostStorage extends Object
Stores and manages Post objects. Handles list operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PostStorage()
    Creates an empty storage list.

    Returns all posts

      Returns:
      the matching posts

      Parameters:
      id - the post id
      Returns:
